arts.ttl: From Brazil: Nottingham Forest reach ‘internal approval’ to sign midfielder
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest have reached the ‘internal approval’ stage to sign midfielder Richard Ríos from Brazilian club Palmeiras. That’s according to Premier League Brasil, who report that the midfielder has been ‘closely watched’ by Nottingham Forestt. They’ve now received ‘internal approval’ to sign him. arts.ttl: Liverpool player’s agents insist he’s not moving – January exit ruled out for now
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa will be staying at Liverpool this month, with his agents insisting a transfer is not on the cards. That’s according to journalist Gianluca Vitale, who reports that Chiesa is ‘increasingly towards permanence’ at Liverpool. He states that Chiesa’s entourage are insisting that the forward will not be on the move this month.
